gates.name: Gate B — East
gates.notes: Critical congestion at 85% capacity. Medical incident reported at Section 104. Spanish translator required for a family near turnstile 6. Redirect fans to Gate C or Gate D.

activeIncident.description: Fan experiencing dizziness, possible dehydration. Medical team dispatched. Spanish translator requested for family communication.

gates.name: Gate C — South
gates.notes: Best entry point. Shortest wait time. Multilingual staff available.

gates.name: Gate D — West
gates.notes: Good alternative to Gate B. Moderate wait. Portuguese translator available.

medical.name: First Aid Station — Concourse Level 1
medical.notes: Heat exhaustion case being treated. Walk-in available. Spanish-speaking nurse on duty.

medical.name: First Aid Station — Concourse Level 2
medical.notes: Fully available. No current wait. Multilingual staff.

medical.name: Medical Tent — Fan Plaza
medical.location: Fan Plaza, near the main entrance fountain
medical.notes: Outdoor triage point. For minor issues only. Arabic-speaking medic available.

medical.name: Ambulance Bay — Emergency Vehicle Access
medical.location: Northwest service road, behind Gate A
medical.notes: 2 ambulances on standby. Direct route to Hackensack University Medical Center (12 min ETA).

medical.name: Rapid Response — Block 104 (Gate B)
medical.notes: Dispatched for medical incident at Gate B. Spanish translator requested. ETA 3 minutes.

transit.delayReason: Signal failure at Junction 4. Service running at reduced frequency.
transit.notes: Delayed by 15 mins. Passengers advised to use Metro Line 3 or Express Shuttle. Spanish and Portuguese announcements active.
Running on schedule. Best option for fans affected by Metro Line 1 delay.

transit.delayReason: Traffic congestion on Route 120 near stadium approach.
transit.notes: Delayed due to traffic on Route 120. Enhanced service active — 3 additional shuttles deployed.
Running on schedule. Good alternative to Metro Line 1.

transit.delayReason: Signal failure at Junction 4. Service suspended until further notice.
transit.notes: Service suspended. Use Metro Line 3 or Express Shuttle instead.

restrooms.name: Restroom Block 101
restrooms.notes: Clean and available. Family restroom with baby changing facilities.

restrooms.name: Restroom Block 112
restrooms.notes: Needs cleaning. Consider Block 124 instead. Cleaning crew dispatched.

restrooms.name: Restroom Block 124
restrooms.notes: Fully clean, no wait. Recommended. Gender-neutral facilities available.

restrooms.name: Restroom Block 136
restrooms.notes: Deep-clean in progress. Use Block 124 or Block 101.

concessions.name: Pitchside Grill
concessions.notes: Burgers, hot dogs, fries. Halal options available.

concessions.name: Global Eats
concessions.notes: International cuisine — tacos, noodles, curry. Vegetarian and vegan options.

concessions.name: Hydration Station
concessions.notes: Water, sports drinks, soda. Shortest wait. Free water refill station.

concessions.name: Trophy Bar
concessions.notes: Full bar. Longest wait. Secondary vendor now open to reduce queue.

concessions.name: Official Store
concessions.notes: Merchandise, jerseys, souvenirs. Multilingual staff available.

translationServices.spanish: Available at Gates A, C, D and all First Aid stations
translationServices.portuguese: Available at Gates C, D and First Aid L2
translationServices.french: Available at Gate C and First Aid L2
translationServices.arabic: Available at Medical Tent — Fan Plaza
translationServices.german: Available at Gate C and Official Store

urgentTranslationNeeded.reason: Family of medical incident patient needs Spanish translator for communication with medical team.

bottlenecks.recommendation: Redirect to Gate C (45% congestion, 3 min wait) or Gate D (61% congestion, 7 min wait). Medical incident at Section 104 requires clear path.
Open secondary corridor near Section 110 to relieve congestion.

diversionRoutes.route: East concourse → South corridor → Gate C entry
diversionRoutes.benefit: Reduces Gate B from 85% to safe levels. Avoids medical incident zone.

diversionRoutes.route: East concourse → West corridor → Gate D entry
diversionRoutes.benefit: Alternative if Gate C reaches capacity. Portuguese translator available.

assemblyPoints.name: Assembly Point — North
assemblyPoints.location: North parking lot, behind Gate A

assemblyPoints.name: Assembly Point — South
assemblyPoints.location: South parking lot, behind Gate C

emergency.evacuationNote: In an emergency, follow the green exit signs and proceed to the nearest assembly point. Do not use elevators. Multilingual evacuation announcements available in EN, ES, PT, FR, AR.

actionsTaken: Medical team dispatched from First Aid L1
Gate B crowd redirected to Gate C and Gate D
Clear path maintained for ambulance access

sensoryQuietZone.notes: Quiet space for fans with sensory sensitivities. Noise-cancelling headphones available.
